response:
the task is to determine how much money Maria will earn on the painting if she sells it for $200.  
she needs to buy a set of brushes for $20 and some canvas for three times more than the brushes.  
the canvas costs 3 * 20 = 60 dollars.  
she needs at least 5 liters of paint, which costs 8 dollars per liter, so 5 * 8 = 40 dollars.  
the total cost of the brushes and canvas is 20 + 60 = 80 dollars.  
the total cost of the paint is 40 dollars.  
the total cost of all the tools is 80 + 40 = 120 dollars.  
she will sell the painting for $200, so she will earn 200 - 120 = 80 dollars.  
the answer is 80.
